category_sources: source_facts.description says Lightweight Shipper for Network Data; official Elastic docs describe Packetbeat as a real-time network packet analyzer for application monitoring and performance analytics.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is packetbeat; official Elastic docs heading is Packetbeat.
docs_sources: Official Elastic documentation page provides Packetbeat reference, quick start, traffic sniffing, fields, and supported protocols.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/elastic/beats, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Elastic docs describe packet capture, protocol decoding, and Elasticsearch output; source_facts.description and executables identify Packetbeat as a CLI shipper for network data.
